posts.author: I-am-Orlando
posts.title:
Asked point blank if there's a 10-20% chance AI wipes out humanity, Elon Musk says that the answer is basically yes. 

The reasoning is that AI and robotics progress now moves on its own, nobody can stop it even if they wanted to, so his personal stance is just to enjoy the ride.

twitter.content:

posts.author: kek_saved_the_world
posts.title:
not a SINGLE education paper reproduced.

NOT ONE.

We need to defund and disestablish every education department, and then ban anyone with an education major from teaching in any school, public or private.

It's all a sham.

twitter.content:
A 7-year study of 3,900 social science papers found that only ~50% could be replicated. 

There was significant variation across fields, however. 

While more than 60% of political science & econ papers were replicated, only ~25% of sociology & 0% of education papers were.
